30-37. General. If Budh is in the 2 from Arudh Lagn, the native will Lord
nd
over the whole country. Śukr in the 2 from Lagn Pad will make one a
poet, or a speaker. If the Dar Pad falls in an angle, or in a trine, counted

from Lagn Pad, or, if Lagn Pad and Dar Pad both have strong Grahas, the
native will be rich and be famous in his country. If the Dar Pad falls in the
th th th
6 / 8 /12 from Lagn Pad, then the native will be poor. If Lagn Pad and the
th
7 therefrom, or an angle, a trine, an Upachaya therefrom is occupied by a
strong Grah, there will be happiness between the husband and wife. If
Lagn Pad and Dar Pad are mutually in Kendras, or Konas, there will be
th th th
amity between the couple. If these be in mutually 6 /8 /12 , doubtlessly
mutual enmity will crop up. O Brahmin, similarly mutual relationship, or
gain, or loss through son etc. be known, based on Lagn Pad and the
rd
relative Bhava Pad.
